text: The juxtaposition of the sterile, utilitarian hallway and the vibrant, information-rich exhibit wall evokes a sense of curiosity in me. Here, I stand on the threshold between two realms: a blank, almost meditative emptiness, and a celebration of research, creativity, and technological progress. The exhibit wall, with its bold R+D and intriguing text, pulls me toward contemplation—is this where human thought merges with machine intelligence? I feel both expectant and thoughtful, eager to discover how this space might foster new connections and ideas.
